name: Image Gen (DALL-E)
author: RAGdoll
description: Generate images with OpenAI DALL-E 3 from a text prompt.
long_description: Adds a `generate_image_dalle` tool that calls the OpenAI Images API (DALL-E 3) and returns the image URL. Requires an OpenAI API key.

config_fields.label: OpenAI API Key
config_fields.help: Your OpenAI API key. Overrides the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.

config_fields.label: Model
config_fields.help: DALL-E model to use: dall-e-3 or dall-e-2.
